ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI wearables. Put it on, speak, transcribe, automatically

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-sdk-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-sdk-flutter
Language: dart
Flutter bindings and tools for utilizing Datadog Mobile SDKs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FoxSensei001/LoveIwara
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FoxSensei001/LoveIwara
Language: dart
Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compatible with Android, Windows and other systems. 第三方的Iwara应用 - 支持多个平台和设备，包括手机、平板和计算机。兼容 安卓、IOS、Windows、MacOS等系统。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HemantKArya/BloomeeTunes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HemantKArya/BloomeeTunes
Language: dart
🌸Bloomee is a cross-platform music app designed to bring you ad-free tunes from various sources. 🌼🎵

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Solido/awesome-flutter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Solido/awesome-flutter
Language: dart
An awesome list that curates the best Flutter libraries, tools, tutorials, articles and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TNT-Likely/BeeCount
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TNT-Likely/BeeCount
Language: dart
🐝 开源记账App，支持iCloud/自建服务器同步(Supabase/WebDAV/S3)，AI智能记账 | Open-source finance tracker with iCloud & self-hosted sync (Supabase/WebDAV/S3), AI-powered bookkeeping, cross-platform, privacy-first

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aiyakuaile/easy_tv_live
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aiyakuaile/easy_tv_live
Language: dart
Easy TV Live App, a lightweight IPTV player, supports all platforms and Android TV big screens. Welcome to download and experience! 极简TV App，一款轻量级IPTV播放器，支持全平台以及安卓电视大屏欢迎下载体验!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chen08209/FlClash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chen08209/FlClash
Language: dart
A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: duobaseio/forui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/duobaseio/forui
Language: dart

Language: dart

URL: https://github.com/flutter/packages
Language: dart

URL: https://github.com/flutter/samples
Language: dart
A collection of Flutter examples and demos

ns0:entry.ns0:title: foss42/apidash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/foss42/apidash
Language: dart
API Dash is a beautiful AI-powered open-source cross-platform (Desktop & Mobile) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your HTTP & GraphQL API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: krille-chan/fluffychat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:

A reactive caching and data-binding framework. Riverpod makes working with asynchronous code a breeze.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarzet/SpotiFLAC-Mobile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarzet/SpotiFLAC-Mobile
Language: dart
Mobile version of SpotiFLAC written in Flutter, powered by a Go backend for high performance. Download Tracks in true FLAC from Tidal, Qobuz, & Amazon Music - no account, no ads, no subscription.
